payment_terms: Base rent payable monthly in advance at rates ranging from $22.00 to $24.00 per rentable square foot annually, plus an electrical inclusion charge of $2.75 per rentable square foot per annum, plus additional rent for operating expenses and taxes based on tenant's 9.27% share of increases over base year 2011.
termination_clauses: Tenant default in payment of rent with 10 days' notice and termination
Tenant default in other obligations continuing for 30 days after written notice
Demised premises become vacant or deserted
Death or permanent disability of any natural person liable on guaranty
Execution or attachment issued against tenant not bonded or dismissed promptly
Landlord may terminate if building damaged in last 12 months of term
Landlord may terminate if demised premises rendered substantially untenantable by casualty
Landlord may terminate if building substantially damaged requiring restoration
Tenant insolvency, bankruptcy filing, or appointment of receiver not vacated within 90 days
Landlord may terminate lease with respect to portion proposed for sublease if tenant seeks to sublease less than substantially all premises
Landlord may terminate entire lease if tenant seeks to assign or sublease substantially all premises
Mortgagee rejection of lease within 20 days of receipt results in immediate termination
